chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1777 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.4590/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.4591/2025 (C/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.44/2025 (C/A) 13-10-2025 M/s Mansoor Hussain Shaikh and Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocates for the Petitioners / Applicants Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioners files statement along with a certificate issued by the Board and application to the Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur of Petitioner No.1 Sain Dino with a request to appoint him as Naib Qasid. Perusal of the application reflects that it was filed on 02-09-2025. The Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur is directed to comply with paragraph 8 of the order dated 19-11-2024 in respect of both the Petitioners and furnish such report to this Court within thirty days. The listed applications stand disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
